app.name: Next Move
app.tagline: Know your best next move in Morocco

confidence.legendLive: Straight from an operator's live system.
confidence.legendCached: From official timetables we cached and spot-checked, with the date we last verified it.
confidence.legendEstimated: Researched but unconfirmed — treat as a starting point and check on the ground.

card.fareNote: Fares are honest ranges, not promises.
card.noMoves: No reliable option found for this trip right now. Try a nearby starting point, or check the city page for arrival guidance.
card.showAlternatives: {count, plural, one {# more option} other {# more options}}

move.title: Arrive now
move.subtitle: From where you stand, the safest, fastest, cheapest next action — with honest confidence.
move.whereTo: Where do you need to be?

plan.title: Plan a route
plan.subtitle: Intercity rail and coach across Morocco, ranked your way, booked on the operator's own site.
plan.noRoutes: No scheduled departure found after that time. Try an earlier hour or the next morning — Moroccan intercity service thins out in the evening.

saved.title: Saved moves
saved.subtitle: Stored on this device — they work offline.
saved.empty: Nothing saved yet. Save a move from the results and it will wait here, offline included.

landing.heroSub: Not a booking site. A calm answer to one question: from where you stand, what's the smartest next action — and how sure are we? Train times, tram lines, fair taxi prices, and the last 200 meters to your riad. Online or offline.
landing.how1Body: Airport curb, station platform, or a square in the medina — pick your spot and your destination.
landing.how2Body: We rank every option by time, cost, trust, and effort — and we show you exactly how confident we are in the data behind it.
landing.how3Body: Fair fare ranges, payment heads-ups, scam alerts where they apply, and landmark directions for the final approach.
landing.coverageSub: Three launch cities plus the national rail network. Tangier and Fes are next.
landing.mapCaption: Launch corridor in green · next cities in saffron
landing.packBody: Download the city pack before you land: the map, verified pins, schedules, and every safety note keep working with zero bars in the medina.
landing.honestySub: Every schedule, pin, and price in the app carries its source and the date we last verified it. When we're not sure, the card says so — in orange.

cities.title: Cities
cities.subtitle: Pick a city for arrival guidance, quick answers, and what to watch out for.

sourcesPage.title: Data sources & honesty
sourcesPage.intro: Next Move is built on open data, official operator timetables, and our own field research. Nothing here is scraped from operator websites; everything carries a verification date, and when we are not confident, the interface says so explicitly. Next Move is independent and not affiliated with any operator.
sourcesPage.editorialBody: Fare ranges, scam patterns, and arrival notes synthesize operator publications, recurring traveler reports across public forums, and on-the-ground verification. They are honest ranges, not guarantees — conditions change faster than any database.
sourcesPage.disclaimer: Always confirm critical departures locally. If something here is wrong or stale, it will show an old verification date — trust the date.

packs.title: Offline packs
packs.subtitle: Download a city before you need it. The answer engine, schedules, verified pins, and safety notes all run on your phone with zero bars.
packs.included1: Every place, stop, and verified pin with landmark walking notes
packs.included2: Cached rail, tram, coach, and bus schedules with their confidence tiers
packs.included3: Taxi fare bands and the full safety advisory layer
packs.included4: The same ranking engine — answers are computed on your phone
packs.installBody: Installed web apps get protected storage on iPhone — Safari won't evict your pack between uses. In Safari: Share → Add to Home Screen. In Chrome: Install app.
packs.downloadFailed: Download failed — check your connection and try again.

offline.title: Offline mode
offline.subtitle: Running entirely from your downloaded pack. Answers are computed on this device.
offline.noPack: No city pack on this device yet. Download one while you're online and this page becomes your offline compass.
